calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Carideo for Gloria Clumeck and Joan Zimmerman.

There being no objection, the Court granted the petition for instructions (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Carideo for Gloria Clumeck.

The Court stated that the issue is identification of any potential Heirs and diligence. Mr. Carideo stated that they used information from the death certificate, the social security number and an online person search. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review and receipt of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Continued To Sep-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Carideo for Gloria Clumeck and Joan Zimmerman.

Mr. Carideo stated that he was not aware of any objections. The Court rasied the issue of what efforts were made to determine if there are any Heirs. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to September 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Continued To Aug-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
